articles.title: U.S.-Iran deal is "within our reach," Omani mediator says - CBS News
articles.snippet: Negotiators from the U.S. and Iran have made "substantial progress" toward a deal to curb Iran's nuclear program, Omani Foreign Minister Badr Albusaidi told CBS News on Friday, as President Trump considers strikes on Iran.
